name: codex-one-turn
description: Wait for long-running local jobs without repeated polling turns.

interface.shortDescription: Keep long-running jobs in one logical turn
interface.longDescription: Runs approved long jobs locally, waits without model polling, and resumes work in the same Codex turn.
defaultPrompt: Use OneTurn to run this long build and finish verification.
OneTurn으로 이 학습을 완료하고 결과까지 검증해줘.
